glosses.ja: だめな; 役に立たない

sentences.target: Je ne trouve ça nulle part.

translations.fr: Je ne trouve ça nulle part.
translations.es: No lo encuentro por ninguna parte.
translations.it: Non lo trovo da nessuna parte.
translations.ru: Я нигде не могу его найти.
translations.pt: Não consigo encontrar isso em lugar nenhum.
translations.he: אני לא מצליח למצוא את זה בשום מקום.
translations.vi: Tôi không tìm thấy nó ở đâu cả.
translations.ar: لا أستطيع العثور على ذلك في أي مكان.
translations.uk: Я ніде не можу його знайти.
translations.hi: मुझे वह कहीं भी नहीं मिल रहा है।
translations.el: Δεν μπορώ να το βρω πουθενά.
translations.nb: Jeg finner det ikke noe sted.
translations.id: Saya tidak bisa menemukannya di mana pun.
translations.sv: Jag kan inte hitta det någonstans.
translations.da: Jeg kan ikke finde det nogen steder.
translations.ja: それがどこにも見つからない。

tokens.explanation: 1st person singular subject clitic pronoun; grammatical subject of 'trouve'.
Negative particle; first element of discontinuous negation with 'nulle part'.
Main verb, present indicative 1st singular; takes 'ça' as its direct object.
Demonstrative pronoun functioning as direct object of 'trouve'.
Negative determiner, feminine singular, modifying 'part'; part of the fixed expression 'nulle part' meaning 'nowhere'.
Common noun; with 'nulle' forms the adverbial locution 'nulle part' ('nowhere').

sentences.target: On ne le voit nulle part.

translations.fr: On ne le voit nulle part.
translations.es: No lo vemos por ninguna parte.
translations.it: Non lo vediamo da nessuna parte.
translations.pt: Não o vemos em lugar nenhum.
translations.he: אנחנו לא רואים אותו בשום מקום.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi không thấy nó ở đâu cả.
translations.hi: हम उसे कहीं भी नहीं देख पा रहे हैं।
translations.nb: Vi kan ikke se den noe sted.
translations.id: Kami tidak bisa melihatnya di mana pun.
translations.sv: Vi kan inte se den någonstans.
translations.da: Vi kan ikke se den nogen steder.
translations.ja: どこにもそれが見えない。

tokens.explanation: Indefinite subject pronoun (often used for 'we'); grammatical subject of 'voit'.
Negative particle; first element of discontinuous negation with 'nulle part'.
3rd person masculine singular clitic pronoun; direct object of 'voit'.
Main verb, present indicative 3rd singular; takes 'le' as direct object.
Negative determiner, feminine singular, modifying 'part'; part of 'nulle part' ('nowhere').
Common noun; together with 'nulle' forms the adverbial locution 'nulle part' ('nowhere').

sentences.target: Ton nom n'est nulle part sur la liste.
sentences.reading: /tɔ̃ nɔ̃ nɛ nyl paʁ syʁ la list/

translations.fr: Ton nom n'est nulle part sur la liste.
translations.ipa: /tɔ̃ nɔ̃ nɛ nyl paʁ syʁ la list/
translations.en: Your name is nowhere on the list.
translations.es: Tu nombre no aparece en ninguna parte de la lista.
translations.de: Dein Name steht nirgends auf der Liste.
translations.it: Il tuo nome non compare da nessuna parte nella lista.
translations.yue: 名單上邊度都冇你個名。
translations.ru: Твоего имени нигде нет в списке.
translations.pt: Seu nome não está em lugar nenhum na lista.
translations.he: השם שלך לא מופיע בשום מקום ברשימה.
translations.vi: Tên của bạn không có ở đâu trong danh sách.
translations.ar: اسمك غير موجود في أي مكان في القائمة.
translations.nl: Jouw naam steht nergens op de lijst.
translations.uk: Твого імені ніде немає у списку.
translations.hu: A neved sehol sincs a listán.
translations.hi: तुम्हारा नाम सूची में कहीं भी नहीं है।
translations.pl: Twojego imienia nie ma nigdzie na liście.
translations.el: Το όνομά σου δεν υπάρχει πουθενά στη λίστα.
translations.nb: Navnet ditt står ikke noe sted på listen.
translations.id: Namamu tidak ada di mana pun dalam daftar.
translations.sv: Ditt namn finns ingenstans på listan.
translations.ro: Numele tău nu apare nicăieri pe listă.
translations.cs: Tvoje jméno není nikde на seznamu.
translations.da: Dit navn står ingen steder på listen.
translations.ja: あなたの名前は名簿のどこにもない。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner, 2nd person singular; modifies 'nom'.
Common noun; head of the noun phrase 'Ton nom'.
Copular auxiliary ('est', 3rd singular present of 'être') with attached negative clitic 'n''; part of the negation with 'nulle part'.
Negative determiner, feminine singular, modifying 'part'; forms 'nulle part' ('nowhere').
Common noun; with 'nulle' yields adverbial 'nulle part' ('nowhere').
Preposition introducing the locative complement 'la liste'.
Definite article, feminine singular; determiner of 'liste'.
Common noun; object of the preposition 'sur'.

sentences.target: Il n'y a nulle part où s'asseoir.

translations.fr: Il n'y a nulle part où s'asseoir.
translations.de: Es gibt nirgends einen Platz zum Sitzen.
translations.it: Non c'è nessun posto dove sedersi.
translations.nl: Er is geen plek om te zitten.
translations.hi: बैठने की कोई जगह नहीं है।
translations.el: Δεν υπάρχει πουθενά να καθίσει κανείς.
translations.nb: Det er ikke noe sted å sitte.
translations.ro: Nu e nicăieri unde să te așezi.
translations.da: Der er ingen steder at sidde.

tokens.explanation: Impersonal subject pronoun used in the existential construction 'il y a'.
Bundle of clitics: negative particle 'n'' attached to locative pronoun 'y'; placed before 'a' in 'il y a'.
Main verb, present indicative 3rd singular; in 'il y a' functions as an existential verb ('there is/are').
Negative determiner, feminine singular, modifying 'part'; forms 'nulle part' ('nowhere').
Common noun; with 'nulle' yields adverbial 'nulle part' ('nowhere').
Relative/interrogative adverb introducing a subordinate clause of place complementing 'nulle part'.
Pronominal infinitive verb ('se' + 'asseoir'); heads the infinitival clause introduced by 'où'.
